response.justification: Bogdan has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to AI and fintech, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and senior technical leadership at scale-ups.
strengths: Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
concerns: Lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture
No clear experience in senior technical leadership at scale-ups

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI
Experience in software development and testing
